name: Boxmania
short_description: Boxmania is a 2D puzzle game designed to be challenging, fun, and to make the player think on every level. Each of the 50 levels is created to show unique aspects of the simple concept of moving boxes, all while being possible. After completion, enjoy the other equally fun game modes.
detailed_description:
Boxmania

Boxmania is a puzzle gamed designed around the theme of moving boxes across the screen in order to align them with green winnable areas. While a simple concept, one soon realizes the complex strategy and patterns needed to solve each level.

Game Play

Game play includes 50 custom levels designed to display how each of the four different boxes function as well as their interactions not only each other but also the environment they are in.

Each level is made on an 8x5 grid with up to eight total boxes (four of each type max), four walls, and one set of teleporters.



Boxmania is a hard game

Most people stop after only the first level and even fewer go on to complete all 50.

Are you up for the challenge?

Completion

After completing all 50 levels, enjoy endless levels in computer made "Unlimited Mode" or design and share custom made levels in the "Level Editor".
